outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Iran says Strait of Hormuz has reverted to 'strict control,' blames U.S. naval blockade
outlets.summary: NBC covers Iran's dramatic reversal on Hormuz opening. Ghalibaf scraps deal. Armed Forces accuse US of 'piracy.' IRGC gunboats fire on tanker.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran says Strait of Hormuz restrictions reimposed due to US 'breaches of trust'
outlets.summary: CNN covers Iran walking back Hormuz opening amid accusations of US bad faith. Next talks expected Monday in Islamabad. Ceasefire expires April 22.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump declares Hormuz 'fully open' at Arizona rally — cites 'good news' on Iran
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump's Turning Point USA appearance claiming Hormuz fully open (Iran had already reversed). Trump on Air Force One says 'pretty good news' but declines details.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: The pope is wrong on Iran. Here's why
outlets.summary: Washington Times op-ed criticizes Pope Leo XIV's calls for ceasefire. Argues diplomatic approach enables Iran's nuclear ambitions.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Hormuz Strait shut down again over US 'piracy', says Tehran
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog covers Day 50: Hormuz reversal, IRGC gunboats firing on tanker, Trump 'false claims,' Iran rejects uranium handover.

outlets.name: The National
outlets.headline: Iran war latest: Chaos in Strait of Hormuz as tankers come under fire from Iranian gunboats
outlets.summary: The National covers IRGC gunboats firing on tanker 20 miles NE of Oman. Two more merchant vessels hit. UKMTO confirmed. No injuries.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Trump cites 'some pretty good news' on Iran, says ceasefire may end if no deal by Wednesday
outlets.summary: Jerusalem Post covers Trump's Air Force One comments and warning that ceasefire may not extend. Iran FM rejects uranium handover.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump Dictates the Terms in Lebanon and Iran, Leaving Netanyahu Boxed In
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis: Trump has 'hijacked Israeli foreign policy.' Netanyahu had no say in Lebanon truce terms. Katz confirms 10km security zone will be held indefinitely.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran sets new maritime rules for Strait of Hormuz as Lebanon truce takes effect
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Iran's Hormuz policies as sovereign maritime management. Reports transit fee framework under development.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran declares Hormuz open for commercial ships as Lebanon ceasefire holds
outlets.summary: Iran International reports on Araghchi's Hormuz opening declaration. Ceasefire diplomacy advancing. Second round of US-Iran talks expected this weekend.
